_comment: Google's official Drive MCP server (remote, hosted at https://drivemcp.googleapis.com/mcp/v1). Read-only is enforced by the OAuth scope you grant: consent to ONLY https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive.readonly (see SETUP.md). Do NOT grant drive (full) or drive.file (write). Merge: claude -> .mcp.json mcpServers, cursor -> .cursor/mcp.json mcpServers, codex_toml -> append to .codex/config.toml.
